# external/ — vendored third-party skills

Skills I did **not** write, kept here so my whole toolchain lives in one place. Each is
unmodified (or lightly integrated) and governed by **its own upstream license** — the MIT
`LICENSE` at the repo root applies only to my own skills under [`../skills/`](../skills/).

| Folder | Upstream | License |
|---|---|---|
| `anthropic-skills/` | [anthropics/skills](https://github.com/anthropics/skills) (mcp-builder, skill-creator, webapp-testing, frontend-design) | Apache-2.0 — each keeps its `LICENSE.txt` |
| `marketingskills/` | [coreyhaines31/marketingskills](https://github.com/coreyhaines31/marketingskills) (ads, ad-creative, analytics, cold-email, copywriting, cro, offers, prospecting) | MIT — see `marketingskills/README.md` |
| `impeccable/` | frontend design/audit skill | Apache-2.0 — see `impeccable/SKILL.md` frontmatter |
